Description: Lock stack: NestJS for HTTP/WebSocket APIs, Prisma as ORM and migration tool for PostgreSQL only, target hosting for API and DB. Document versions (Node LTS, Nest, Prisma). Out of scope: MySQL unless separate ADR.
Acceptance_Criteria: ADR or one-pager committed; team agrees; no ambiguous ORM/DB choice.

Description: DATABASE_URL for Prisma (server only), JWT keys, PayPal, SMTP, SMS, S3. Nest ConfigModule + env validation. Never expose DB URL to Vite.
Acceptance_Criteria: Checklist of secrets; .env.example for API without real values; frontend only VITE_API_URL and public keys.

Description: List files using supabase client: auth, from(), rpc(), functions.invoke(), storage, realtime channels.
Acceptance_Criteria: Matrix: file path, call type, replacement Nest route or WS event.

Description: Map each supabase/functions/* to future Nest module (controller + service); note env vars and triggers.
Acceptance_Criteria: All functions covered; none orphaned.

Task_Title: RPCs, SQL functions, and RLS inventory
Description: List supabase.rpc calls and SQL functions in migrations; extract RLS policies per table. Plan Prisma-level authorization (guards) replacing RLS.
Acceptance_Criteria: RPC matrix with parameters; RLS rules summarized; has_role and other security paths mapped to Nest guards.

Description: Create production-grade Postgres (RDS, Cloud SQL, managed K8s, or self-hosted). Configure backups, TLS, extensions needed by schema (uuid, pgcrypto, etc.), connection limits.
Acceptance_Criteria: Connection from bastion or CI works with SSL; backup window defined; DATABASE_URL format documented for Prisma.

Task_Title: Deploy full SQL schema to target
Description: Replay supabase/migrations in order on empty DB, OR pg_dump --schema-only from Supabase and restore to target. Include public app tables, types, indexes, constraints, SQL functions used by RPCs. Exclude or separately handle Supabase auth/storage extensions if not cloning auth schema.
Acceptance_Criteria: prisma db execute or psql: no errors; \dt lists expected tables; functions exist for RPC parity plan.

Description: Full data migration: pg_dump --data-only from Supabase (or provider backup restore), OR logical replication, OR table-ordered COPY with FK checks deferred. Include every business table and large tables (orders, logs, email state). Plan maintenance window or brief read-only on source. After load: run ANALYZE; fix sequences with setval to max(id).
Acceptance_Criteria: Per-table row count matches source (automated diff); random FK spot-checks pass; sequences produce new IDs without collision.

Description: Script comparing source Supabase vs target: counts, checksums on critical tables, max timestamps. Document acceptable deltas (e.g. excluded auth schema).
Acceptance_Criteria: Signed validation report; stakeholders approve before API cutover.

Description: Repeat MIG-007–MIG-009 against staging Postgres; rehearse timing and rollback (drop schema / restore snapshot).
Acceptance_Criteria: Staging holds full schema + representative or full copy; runbook updated with actual durations.

Task_Title: User identity migration off Supabase Auth
Description: Export or map auth.users to application user table: preserve UUIDs where stores.user_id references them OR one-time relink. Password: export bcrypt hashes if Supabase allows or force password reset. MFA factors: re-enroll in Nest flow.
Acceptance_Criteria: All active users can authenticate via new Nest auth; FK from stores to user ids valid; documented exceptions.

Description: Copy objects from Supabase Storage to S3-compatible bucket; preserve paths or update stores.profile_picture_url in bulk. Script with retry and verification.
Acceptance_Criteria: Object count/size matches or URLs updated and images load from new base URL.

Description: Point DATABASE_URL at migrated Postgres; run prisma db pull to generate models from live schema. Review public schema only; ignore supabase internal schemas unless needed.
Acceptance_Criteria: schema.prisma generated; prisma validate passes; no accidental drop of tables.

Description: Fix @@map/@map for snake_case, relation names, enums, Json fields, Unsupported types. Add indexes in Prisma if missing. Document views: use prisma.$queryRaw or migrate to tables.
Acceptance_Criteria: prisma generate succeeds; Prisma Client typings usable in Nest services; team review complete.

Task_Title: Prisma Migrate baseline for future changes
Description: Brownfield: baseline existing DB — prisma migrate diff or documented initial migration marking current state; from then on use prisma migrate dev/deploy for schema changes only (no drift from manual SQL without Prisma).
Acceptance_Criteria: CI applies migrations to empty test DB OR migrate deploy is no-op on prod clone; drift detection documented.

Description: prisma/seed.ts for local dev subset; never required for prod (prod uses real migrated data).
Acceptance_Criteria: npm run prisma:seed creates minimal dev data for Nest local run.

Description: nest new or monorepo app; ConfigModule, ValidationPipe, global exception filter, health controller (/health), structured logging (pino), Swagger optional.
Acceptance_Criteria: GET /health 200; lint/test pipeline green; Dockerfile optional.

Description: Official pattern: PrismaService extends PrismaClient, onModuleInit connect, onModuleDestroy disconnect; global module or per-request as needed. Unit test with test DB or docker-compose Postgres.
Acceptance_Criteria: Any module can inject PrismaService; e2e test runs query against test DB; CI runs prisma generate.

Description: @nestjs/throttler on auth/OTP; CORS for Vite origins.
Acceptance_Criteria: Preflight OK; brute-force OTP returns 429 in test.

Description: Organize AuthModule, StoresModule, OrdersModule, etc.; each service uses PrismaService; DTOs with class-validator.
Acceptance_Criteria: Architecture diagram or README; no circular deps.

Description: Nest guards + JWT; bcrypt/argon2; user rows in Postgres via Prisma; map user id to stores.user_id.
Acceptance_Criteria: E2E: register, login, JWT valid; Prisma shows user row.

Description: Replace Supabase OTP with Nest endpoints; store OTP in customer_otp_codes or equivalent via Prisma.
Acceptance_Criteria: Flows match Login, StoreRegistration, ForgotPassword UX contract.

Description: Refresh tokens stored in DB or Redis; Nest endpoints for refresh/logout.
Acceptance_Criteria: Token rotation works; logout invalidates refresh.

Description: Secure reset tokens in DB (Prisma); update password hashes.
Acceptance_Criteria: Reset flow E2E; tokens single-use.

Description: TOTP/WebAuthn in Nest; Prisma for factors if stored.
Acceptance_Criteria: AdminLogin parity; cannot bypass MFA for admin role.

Description: Prisma queries to user_roles; RolesGuard on admin controllers.
Acceptance_Criteria: Non-admin JWT rejected; unit tests on guard.

Description: integrations/lovable/index.ts: pass Nest JWT/session or deprecate.
Acceptance_Criteria: Documented behavior; no broken dev flow.

Description: Nest service with Prisma transactions; port generate_store_id logic from SQL or app layer.
Acceptance_Criteria: Parity with supabase-store and AuthContext store creation.

Description: POST; Prisma query matching RPC behavior.
Acceptance_Criteria: Same duplicate detection as current RPC tests.

Description: Prisma for global_products, store_products, store_portfolios, stock_entries.
Acceptance_Criteria: Admin CRUD; FK integrity.

Description: Prisma for customer_orders, store_notifications; scoped by store.
Acceptance_Criteria: EmployeeDashboard operations covered.

Description: Implement former RPCs via Prisma/raw SQL in service: get_public_store_by_slug, slots, qr products, validate customer, order status.
Acceptance_Criteria: StoreOrder works against Nest API only.

Description: Prisma CRUD for store_customers, store_time_slots.
Acceptance_Criteria: Settings.tsx parity.

Description: Prisma for support_tickets, support_messages.
Acceptance_Criteria: SupportChatbot + AdminSupportPanel parity.

Description: Prisma for community_channels, community_messages.
Acceptance_Criteria: Polling OK until realtime.

Description: Prisma for audit_logs, coupons, store_subscriptions, webhook_logs, invoices.
Acceptance_Criteria: Admin billing and revenue panels load.

Description: Prisma feedback table.
Acceptance_Criteria: AppHeader feedback path works.

Description: Services + queues; Prisma for email logs/state; port Edge templates.
Acceptance_Criteria: Staging emails send; idempotent queue.

Description: Controllers for unsubscribe/suppression; Prisma for tokens/suppressed_emails.
Acceptance_Criteria: Unsubscribe.tsx points to Nest; secured.

Description: Nest + Prisma customer_otp_codes.
Acceptance_Criteria: Settings customer OTP flow E2E.

Description: Port send-order-sms; call from order status service.
Acceptance_Criteria: Sandbox SMS or logged success.

Description: Controller/service; Prisma for subscriptions/invoices; update PayPalCheckout + Settings URLs to Nest.
Acceptance_Criteria: Sandbox end-to-end; webhooks to Nest.

Description: Nest service calling email/SMS.
Acceptance_Criteria: New order notifies store like today.

Description: @nestjs/schedule or external cron hitting secured endpoint.
Acceptance_Criteria: Runs on schedule; logs errors.

Description: If distinct from general OTP, port to Nest.
Acceptance_Criteria: StoreRegistration completes.

Description: @nestjs/websockets or socket.io; JWT on handshake; event names for orders/notifications/support/community.
Acceptance_Criteria: Design doc + PoC broadcast.

Description: Connect to Nest WS; remove supabase.channel.
Acceptance_Criteria: <1s latency staging; reconnect OK.

Task_Title: Upload API and S3 integration in Nest
Description: Multipart or signed URL; update profile_picture_url via Prisma. Align with MIG-012 migrated objects.
Acceptance_Criteria: New uploads work post-cutover; public URLs consistent.

Description: fetch/axios to Nest; Bearer JWT; no Supabase env in prod.
Acceptance_Criteria: Single client module; typed errors.

Description: Remove supabase.auth; call Nest.
Acceptance_Criteria: QA auth flows; no supabase in auth files.

Description: api/store.ts calling Nest; Prisma-backed routes.
Acceptance_Criteria: No supabase imports in store module.

Description: Includes PayPal, OTP invokes, uploads to Nest.
Acceptance_Criteria: Checklist sign-off.

Description: Public flows to Nest.
Acceptance_Criteria: E2E staging.

Description: AdminDashboard, panels, analytics, PayPal, chatbot.
Acceptance_Criteria: No supabase in listed components.

Description: If product needs /reset-password.
Acceptance_Criteria: Route works with Nest reset token.

Description: Delete client wrapper; clean env.
Acceptance_Criteria: Build passes; grep no supabase.

Task_Title: API contract tests (Nest + Prisma test DB)
Description: Jest + supertest or Pact; prisma migrate reset for CI DB.
Acceptance_Criteria: CI green: auth, orders, admin denial.

Description: Playwright/Cypress full journeys on Vite + Nest + migrated DB.
Acceptance_Criteria: Nightly green on staging.

Description: Final incremental data sync if needed (delta after MIG-008); DNS to Nest; VITE_API_URL; freeze Supabase writes; rollback plan.
Acceptance_Criteria: Runbook approved; dry run completed.

Description: APM on Nest; Postgres backups; Prisma query logging in prod cautiously.
Acceptance_Criteria: Alerts; restore drill.

Description: After stability; archive backup; revoke keys.
Acceptance_Criteria: Zero traffic 2+ weeks; costs stopped.
